General.Name: FIPP S.A.
General.Description: FIPP S.A. engages in the real estate business in Paris and internationally. The company acquires or constructs buildings for rental. It is also involved in the direct or indirect holding of interests in companies with buildings rental activity. The company's property portfolio includes shops and hotels. FIPP S.A. was incorporated in 1954 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
